parameters.content:
## [Intake] CAIAC Lead Capture v2.0.0

Multi-tenant inbound lead capture from Tally forms.

**Trigger:** POST /intake/lead (webhook)
**Auth:** slug + key parsed from Tally hidden fields or query params
**Dedup:** intake_fingerprint = deterministic hash of email
**DB gate:** caiac.leads INSERT with ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE
**AI scoring:** delegated to [Utility] Score Lead v1.0.0
**Email:** delegated to [Utility] Send Email v1.0.0

Client config (field_map, from_name, from_email, business_description) drives all per-client behaviour.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "Invalid payload — expected Tally body with data.fields array" }

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id              AS client_id,
  slug            AS client_slug,
  webhook_secret,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'notify_email'          AS notify_email,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'sheet_id'              AS sheet_id,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'field_map'             AS field_map,
  config->'lead_capture'->>'business_description'  AS business_description,
  COALESCE(config->'lead_capture'->>'from_name',  'CAIAC Digital')        AS from_name,
  COALESCE(config->'lead_capture'->>'from_email', 'caiacgroup@gmail.com') AS from_email
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $('Parse Tally Payload').first().json.slug }}'
  AND active = true
LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT enabled FROM caiac.client_features WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Get Client Config').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid AND feature = 'intake'), false) AS enabled

parameters.responseBody: {"error": "This feature is not enabled for your account."}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM caiac.leads WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid AND intake_fingerprint = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}' LIMIT 1) AS lead_id,
  (SELECT qualification_score FROM caiac.leads WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid AND intake_fingerprint = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}' LIMIT 1) AS qualification_score,
  (SELECT qualification_score_reason FROM caiac.leads WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid AND intake_fingerprint = '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}' LIMIT 1) AS qualification_score_reason

INSERT INTO caiac.leads
  (client_id, crm_type, source_id, source_channel, lifecycle_stage, intake_fingerprint, qualification_score, qualification_score_reason)
VALUES
  ('{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid, 'form', '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}', 'form', 'intake', '{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.fingerprint }}', {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.qualification_score }}, '{{ $('Score Lead').first().json.qualification_score_reason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
ON CONFLICT (client_id, crm_type, source_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  qualification_score        = EXCLUDED.qualification_score,
  qualification_score_reason = EXCLUDED.qualification_score_reason
RETURNING id AS lead_id

INSERT INTO caiac.automation_runs (lead_id, automation_type, state)
VALUES ('{{ $('Insert Lead to DB').first().json.lead_id }}'::uuid, 'follow_up', 'pending')
RETURNING id AS run_id
UPDATE caiac.automation_runs SET state = 'sent', sent_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Insert Automation Run').first().json.run_id }}'::uuid

INSERT INTO caiac.ai_usage_log (client_id, workflow, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_estimate)
VALUES ('{{ $('Extract and Fingerprint Lead').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid, '[Intake] CAIAC Lead Capture v2.0.0', {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.tokens_in }}, {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.tokens_out }}, {{ $('Score Lead').first().json.cost_estimate }})

INSERT INTO caiac.error_log (client_slug, workflow_name, node_name, error_message, payload)
VALUES ('unknown', '[Intake] CAIAC Lead Capture v2.0.0', '{{ $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted ?? ''unknown'' }}', '{{ ($json.error?.message ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.execution ?? {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb)
